name: Lantern Blade
overview: Adapted from the manhua of the same name, Lantern Blade seamlessly merges martial-arts adventure and Lovecraftian horror. With captivating fight scenes and a worldview spanning decades, the series carefully selects the most impressive moments from the original comic book, reorganizing them to create a powerful clash between truth and falsehood, kindness and evil.

trailers.title: The Adventure of a Young Lady and a Wandering Blade Man | LANTERN BLADE Trailer
